meanings.definition: a sign posted in a public place as an advertisement
examples: a poster advertised the coming attractions

meanings.definition: (bookkeeping) a listing on the company's records
examples: the posting was made in the cash account
the postmark indicates the time of mailing

meanings.definition: affix in a public place or for public notice
publicize with, or as if with, a poster
examples: I'll post the news on the bulletin board

meanings.definition: assign to a post; put into a post
examples: The newspaper posted him in Timbuktu

meanings.definition: display, as of records in sports games
transfer (entries) from one account book to another
ride Western style and bob up and down in the saddle in rhythm with a horse's trotting gait
place so as to be noticed
examples: post a warning at the dump

meanings.definition: cause to be directed or transmitted to another place
examples: I'll mail you the paper when it's written
She was branded a loose woman
